art_market.summary: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion. 2026 trends emphasize a return to materiality, accessible art for new collectors, and hybrid digital/physical exhibitions. Instagram remains a primary sales channel.

stock_market.summary: Market experiencing heightened volatility with fourth straight week of declines. Inflation concerns and energy price spikes (due to Iran tensions) are weighing heavily. AI sector shows mixed results.
